title: Geo-User Session Tracking and Regional Conversion Funnels
dataSources: **Indexes:** `web` for HTTP access telemetry; **`ecommerce`** (or `pos_retail_events`) for server-side commerce events. **Sourcetypes:** `access_combined` from Universal Forwarders **monitor** inputs on Apache/Nginx (same stanza patterns as storefront origin logging — `[monitor:///var/log/nginx/access.log]` / `[monitor:///var/log/apache2/access.log]` into `index=web`, sourcetype `access_combined`). **Checkout / funnel events:** HEC POSTs from Shopify webhooks (`orders/create`), Magento business event export, Salesforce Commerce Cloud **OCAPI** bridge, or a custom middleware that emits JSON with stage markers (`funnel_stage=cart|checkout|payment|confirm`). **Input mechanisms:** UF file tail (**syslog-style batch** off disk), **Splunk HTTP Event Collector** (token bound to index `ecommerce`, sourcetype `checkout:event` or vendor-specific sourcetype), optional **Splunk DB Connect** if stages are reconstructed from OLTP **`order_lines`** nightly — not real-time. **Key fields:** `JSESSIONID` (illustrative — substitute `_ga`, `_shopify_y`, Salesforce `dwsid`, or signed session id per platform), **`uri_path`** for path-based milestones, **`clientip_country` / GeoIP-derived region** aligned with storefront logs, **`funnel_stage`** when using HEC (canonical stage names reduce fragile regex drift). Correlate commerce events **on `(session_id, order_id)`** when exposing both.**Volume:** Retail access logs dominate volume (**50k–1M+ events/hour**); commerce event streams are **two to four orders of magnitude smaller** (**1k–40k/hour**). Size HEC tokens with burst limits at **2× peak Black Friday** traffic.**CIM:** Path-only variant stays pre-CIM; when you map pages to **Web** CIM and purchases to **Authentication**/**Web** custom extensions, document aliases in `props.conf` for audit repeatability.
app: **Universal Forwarder** on web tier with `Splunk_TA_nix` or Apache/Nginx TA parsing — install under `$SPLUNK_HOME/etc/apps/` on UFs and parsing tier **9.x+**. **Heavy Forwarder or Cloud** hosts the **HEC** listener: `etc/system/local/inputs.conf` global HEC stanza `[http://8088]` with `enableSSL=1`, per-token stanzas in `local/inputs.conf` setting `index=ecommerce`, `sourcetype=checkout:event`. **Shopify/Magento:** use platform-native apps or a small **lambda** that signs and POSTs to HEC. **Splunk Enterprise / Cloud 9.2+** recommended for token rotation UI. **Search Head:** macros `retail_funnel_paths` and `retail_session_field` in `macros.conf` so merchandising can change cookie names without SPL edits.
spl:
index=web sourcetype=access_combined
| eval region=coalesce(clientip_country, geoip_country, "unknown")
| eval hit_cart=if(match(uri_path, "(?i)/cart") OR match(uri_path, "(?i)cart\\."), 1, 0)
| eval hit_checkout=if(match(uri_path, "(?i)/checkout"), 1, 0)
| eval hit_confirm=if(match(uri_path, "(?i)/confirm") OR match(uri_path, "(?i)/thank-you"), 1, 0)
| stats
    dc(eval(if(hit_cart==1,JSESSIONID,null()))) as sessions_cart
    dc(eval(if(hit_checkout==1,JSESSIONID,null()))) as sessions_checkout
    dc(eval(if(hit_confirm==1,JSESSIONID,null()))) as sessions_confirm
    dc(JSESSIONID) as sessions_any
  by region
| where sessions_any > 50
| eval cart_rate=round((sessions_cart/sessions_any)*100,2)
| eval checkout_rate=round((sessions_checkout/sessions_any)*100,2)
| eval confirm_rate=round((sessions_confirm/sessions_any)*100,2)
| sort - sessions_any
description: Summarizes, for each geographic region, how many distinct browsing sessions touch cart, checkout, and confirmation URL patterns so you can see where multi-step shopping flows thin out relative to overall traffic landing on the storefront.
value: Revenue-focused teams localize fixes—payments, duties messaging, sizing tables, warehouse cutoffs—toward regions that pay for traffic but stall before purchase, tightening return on advertising spend faster than aggregated global dashboards allow.
implementation: Guarantee a stable session cookie field (`JSESSIONID` illustrated—swap for your storefront key). Correlate optionally with `checkout:event` rows keyed on the same session for higher-fidelity confirmations. Exclude staff and partner subnets. Document URL patterns per platform (Salesforce Commerce Cloud, Shopify, custom) inside a macro so merchandising changes do not silently break funnel stages.
visualization: **Layout:** (1) **Panel A — “Regional funnel stacks”** — Stacked horizontal bar showing `sessions_cart`, `sessions_checkout`, `sessions_confirm` proportional to `sessions_any`, split by `region`. (2) **Panel B — “Conversion-rate table”** — Sortable table: `region`, `sessions_any`, `cart_rate`, `checkout_rate`, `confirm_rate`; conditional formatting green/red vs global baseline macro `retail_global_baseline`. (3) **Panel C — “Parallel journey view”** — Parallel coordinates connecting stages (mini-multiples per top-5 regions) for merchandising narratives. (4) **Panel D — “Confidence ribbon”** — Time series of `sessions_any` per region plus overlay markers for campaigns (lookup-driven annotations).
dataModelAcceleration: Not applicable: storefront paths and identifiers remain application-specific.

references.title: Splunk Lantern — Use Case Explorer: Retail
Google — Core Web Vitals (UX context alongside funnel KPIs)
Apache HTTP Server — mod_log_config and custom log formats
Splunk Documentation — Receive JSON over HTTP Event Collector

knownFalsePositives: (1) **Mobile-wallet and deep-link checkouts** — Shoppers bypass `/checkout` URL labels while converting via Apple/Google Pay intents. *Mitigation:* blend in `checkout:event` HEC with `payment_authorized=yes` counts; widen confirm regex or join on transaction id rather than THANK YOU page hits only. (2) **Omni-channel completion** — BOPIS and store POS settle sales without web confirmation lines. *Mitigation:* ingest **order attribution events** keyed by loyalty id; downgrade regions with dominant omni fulfilment unless order feed reconciles within 24h. (3) **Affiliate and UTM-parameter URL churn** — `uri_path` stable but rewritten query strings inflate unique session parsers. *Mitigation:* strip queries in transforms for funnel stats only (`| eval uri_clean=mvindex(split(uri_path,"?"),0)` substitute if path includes query anomalies). (4) **Session timeout mismatch** — `JSESSIONID` rotation faster than storefront analytics SLA makes `sessions_any` undercount continuation journeys. *Mitigation:* harmonise idle timeout macros with vendor analytics (**30 vs 120 min**) before comparing rates week-over-week. (5) **Staff and call-centre SSO traffic** — Internal browsers poll `/cart` for testing, distorting small regions. *Mitigation:* subtract corporate CIDR ranges and named VPN egress pools via `where NOT cidrmatch("10.0.0.0/8", clientip)`. (6) **Headless bots completing fake carts** — Good bots inflate cart hits without revenue. *Mitigation:* UA + behaviour filters; require `sessions_checkout > N AND confirm_rate above floor` before paging growth teams.
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
• **Session identifier source of truth:** Document the production cookie/header name replacing `JSESSIONID` (`_ga` session derivation, Shopify `checkout_token`, Salesforce `dwsid`, etc.).
• **RBAC:** Search roles readable for `web` and optional `ecommerce` indexes — separate **Growth** view (masked IP) vs **Ops** raw when GDPR/CCPA restricts full client IP browsing.
• **URL taxonomy workbook:** Canonical path prefixes for `/cart`, `/checkout`, `/confirm`, locale-prefixed routes (`/en-gb/checkout`) maintained with merchandising; stored as macro **`retail_funnel_regex`**.
• **Splunk 9.x+** with KV or CSV lookup **`retail_staff_subnets`** to strip internal testers.
• **Consent logging:** Confirm marketing permitted use of behavioural funnels written into privacy DPIA.

Step 1 — Configure data collection
**UF inputs** mirror UC-21.6.13: nginx/apache access logs to `index=web`, sourcetype `access_combined`. Guarantee load balancers annotate true client IPs into `clientip`.

**HEC for checkout enrichment** — `heavy_forwarder/local/inputs.conf`:

```ini
[splunk_hec_tls]
disabled = 0
enableSSL = 1
port = 8088
sslPassword = ...

[checkout_hec]
disabled = 0
token = <HEC_TOKEN_HERE>
indexes = ecommerce
```

Prefer **one sourcetype** `checkout:event` with explicit `funnel_stage` for future phased migration off regex funnel detection.

**Verification:** Compare `sessions_any` totals from Splunk versus GA4/BigQuery export single-day single-region — divergence >8% triggers parser review (`| stats dc(JSESSIONID)` vs vendor export).

Step 2 — Create the search and alert
```spl
index=web sourcetype=access_combined
| eval region=coalesce(clientip_country, geoip_country, "unknown")
| eval hit_cart=if(match(uri_path, "(?i)/cart") OR match(uri_path, "(?i)cart\\."), 1, 0)
| eval hit_checkout=if(match(uri_path, "(?i)/checkout"), 1, 0)
| eval hit_confirm=if(match(uri_path, "(?i)/confirm") OR match(uri_path, "(?i)/thank-you"), 1, 0)
| stats
    dc(eval(if(hit_cart==1,JSESSIONID,null()))) as sessions_cart
    dc(eval(if(hit_checkout==1,JSESSIONID,null()))) as sessions_checkout
    dc(eval(if(hit_confirm==1,JSESSIONID,null()))) as sessions_confirm
    dc(JSESSIONID) as sessions_any
  by region
| where sessions_any > 50
| eval cart_rate=round((sessions_cart/sessions_any)*100,2)
| eval checkout_rate=round((sessions_checkout/sessions_any)*100,2)
| eval confirm_rate=round((sessions_confirm/sessions_any)*100,2)
| sort - sessions_any
```

Understanding this SPL
• **Base dataset** restricts to web access logs; optional `union` branch from `checkout:event` improves confirm fidelity when appended with matching **session_field** transforms.
• **`region`** unifies whichever GeoIP field your pipeline emits.
• **`hit_*` evals** mark hits whose `uri_path` matches regex intents — adjust regex macros for multilingual slugs (`/panier`).
• **`dc(eval(if(hit_cart==1,JSESSIONID,null())))`** counts distinct sessions that ever touched cart without requiring the cart hit to be last action in session.
• **`sessions_any`** denominator is breadth of observable sessions in region bucket—acts as eligibility filter when `where sessions_any > 50`.
• **Rate evals** turn raw distinct counts into **percent-of-sessions** leadership metrics comparable across regions.
• **`sort - sessions_any`** prioritises statistically robust geos first.

Trigger only on material drops: time range **last 7 days** vs prior 7 days with a `where` on week-over-week deltas (optional join subsearch); not for sub-minute paging.

Step 3 — Validate
(a) Export vendor funnel JSON for Region=EMEA Tue; compare **`checkout_rate`** within 5% tolerance.
(b) Replay **single session GUID** (`JSESSIONID`) path list—ensure stage ordering plausible.
(c) Inspect **confirm_rate=0 but revenue stable** ⇒ digital receipt path lacks `/thank-you`; fix regex.
(d) QA **French Canada** localized URLs—confirm cart regex matches localized slug.
(e) Correlate **`hit_checkout=1`** with payment errors index if exists.
(f) Statistical stability: widen window to **28d** and compare variance; unstable regions flagged for insufficient sample macro adjustment.

Step 4 — Operationalize
**Dashboard:** Panels per `visualization` — stack bars, KPI table with baseline delta, parallel coordinates snapshot, annotated trend.
**Alerting:** Slack `#growth-analytics`; PagerDuty only if **`checkout_rate`** free-fall coincides **`payment_gateway_error`** lookup spike.
**Runbook:** 1) Verify campaign launch overlays. 2) Check CDN geo routing errors. 3) Validate payment rollout per region flag. 4) Engage **L10n** if slug rename. 5) Raise **engineering** incident if regex macro empty after CMS migration.

Step 5 — Troubleshooting
• **Null `JSESSIONID` everywhere** — cookie not logged; enrich via `cust_session` extraction from `_raw` alternate pattern.
• **Huge `sessions_checkout`, zero confirms** — A/B hides thank-you step; ingest order feed.
• **Region unknown ballooning** — GeoIP misses IPv6 carriers; enrich via paid DB.
• **Regex CPU burn** — precompute `hit_*` fields at index time using `EVAL-hit_cart` transforms.
• **Weekly alert noise** — seasonality unaware; introduce `anomalydetection` or static holiday calendar lookup.
• **Consent-blocked shoppers** — under-represented; align with CMP categories before trusting EU dips.
• **Merchant staging hits** — ensure `NOT host=*stg*` filter in macro.
grandmaExplanation: We see how many online browsers in each area actually move from browsing to buying. When one place stalls more than others, we help you focus fixes where marketing money and customer patience meet.
